_note: DERIVED from the submittal's 'Request for Information' section (pages 4–5). This is the REAL domain-authentic collaboration pattern your app's 'issues' workflow mirrors — supplier flags ambiguity → GC (or architect) responds in-line → supplier acknowledges change → resolution or voided.

rfis.title: Panic device / lockset finish — 630/32D vs 626/26D
rfis.supplier_note: Some sets list 630/32D finish, others 626/26D. We scheduled as shown on the HW sets. Please verify.
rfis.gc_response: 626 at interior doors, stainless exterior doors.

rfis.title: Electrified hardware — door schedule vs HW sets mismatch
rfis.supplier_note: Security column on door schedule doesn't match HW sets for card readers. We deferred to HW sets. Design team to advise if electrified hardware required elsewhere.

rfis.title: ACSI 'LC' modifier — non-standard nomenclature
rfis.supplier_note: Sets with ACSI modifications list 'LC' — not ACSI nomenclature. We scheduled with QC3 quick connect.
rfis.gc_response: Quick Connect yes, include 6" con for hinge frame side.

rfis.title: Flushbolts on 9'/10' rated pairs — constant-latching not approved
rfis.supplier_note: Constant-latching flushbolts only approved on rated doors with 12" rod. On 9'/10' doors with 36/48" rod they're only approved on non-rated doors. Recommend Ives FB31P automatic flushbolt.

rfis.title: 110A-02B / 110A-03B double-egress handling
rfis.supplier_note: HW set DH-4 specified standard swing pair but plans show double egress with card reader both sides. Proposed CHEXIT delayed egress + EPT hinges.
rfis.supplier_followup: Bulletin 3 omits these openings; RFI no longer requires resolution.

rfis.title: 110A-04B / 110A-05B / 110A-06B — double-egress without access control
rfis.supplier_note: HW set DH-4 specified standard swing pair; plans show double-egress with no access control. Proposed two concealed vertical-rod panic devices.

rfis.title: Tags 1307, 1308 — schedule lists DH-2 for pairs (DH-2 is single)
rfis.supplier_note: Door schedule lists DH-2 (single) but both are pairs. We scheduled with DH-1.

rfis.title: Tag 1316 — rated pair flushbolt configuration
rfis.supplier_note: Specified with AD-4 (manual flushbolts + single closer). Rated pairs typically need auto flushbolts, coordinator, closer on both leaves. Please verify with AHJ.
rfis.gc_response: Closers on both doors, LBR fire pin if rated.

rfis.title: Tags 2100, 2104 — restroom entry passage vs privacy
rfis.supplier_note: AD-10 lists privacy set. These are common-use restroom entries; we scheduled passage sets.

rfis.title: Tag ST-1C — stairwell is interior, not exterior
rfis.supplier_note: Schedule lists EX-3 (exterior). Not an exterior opening. Revised hinges, closer, threshold, removed rain drip. See new set EX3-R.
